case_title: EUGENE A. VLAHOS VS. PAUL HEDZES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEDZES, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET, UNIT 329, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEDGES, PAUL (SUED AS HEDZES) HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HEDZES, PAUL
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT HEDGES, PAUL (SUED AS HEDZES)
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. AS TO DEFENDANT HEDZES, PAUL

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEDGES, PAUL (SUED AS HEDZES) HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. AS TO DEFENDANT HEDZES, PAUL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HEDZES, PAUL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-25-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PAUL HEDGES' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES & EXPENSES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. SERVED NOV-16-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEDZES, PAUL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $24.28 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT HEDGES, PAUL (SUED AS HEDZES)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HEDZES, PAUL

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-25-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PAUL HEDGES' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT HEDGES, PAUL (SUED AS HEDZES)
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: XXX DEFENDANT PAUL HEDGES (SUED AS HEDZES) STILL OWES 1ST APPEARANCE FEES XXX.
